'''鈭歭-v-th-h''' ('''kalavthehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tinge|tinge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tinge|tinge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-v-th-h
|-
! Lemma
| kalavthehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilavthehoko|thilavthehoko]] || [[word:jilavthehoko|jilavthehoko]] || [[word:shilavthehoko|shilavthehoko]] || [[word:kilavthehoko|kilavthehoko]]
